name: memory-store-mcp-server
description: MCP Server - AI 主动记忆管理系统，支持多工作区、冷热分层、批量操作、四数据链路对话原文读取、Auto Summary 双轨制、黄金片段提取、进程生命周期容错

scripts.test: npm run test:chain-schema && npm run test:ls-model-defaults && npm run test:model-bridge && npm run test:model-bridge-claude-code && npm run test:record-generator-codex && npm run test:record-generator-coverage && npm run test:record-generator-parallel && npm run test:record-update-snapshot && npm run test:record-generator-phase-count && npm run test:background-tasks-progress && npm run test:codex-client && npm run test:claude-code-client && npm run test:windsurf-client && npm run test:codex-deep-locate && npm run test:codex-attachments && npm run test:conversation-context-probe && npm run test:conversation-list-fast-only && npm run test:conversation-attachments && npm run test:conversation-exporter && npm run test:record-ownership && npm run test:record-reader && npm run test:record-reader-tools && npm run test:stage-guard-self-reference && npm run test:stage-guard-evidence && npm run test:stage-guard-evidence-index
